mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_EXECUTION_LOG (job_id, jasper_fire_time, execution_status, output_file_uri, error_message, triggered_by) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{jasperFireTime}, #{executionStatus}, #{outputFileUri}, #{errorMessage}, #{triggeredBy})
mapper.select: SELECT el.execution_id, el.job_id, sj.job_label, r.report_name, el.jasper_fire_time, el.execution_status, el.triggered_by, el.error_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.MAIL_SEND_LOG ml WHERE ml.execution_id = el.execution_id AND ml.send_status = 'SENT') AS sent_count FROM dbo.JOB_EXECUTION_LOG el JOIN dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj ON el.job_id = sj.job_id JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id WHERE el.execution_id = #{executionId}

SELECT TOP (#{limit}) el.execution_id, el.job_id, sj.job_label, r.report_name, el.jasper_fire_time, el.execution_status, el.triggered_by, el.error_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.MAIL_SEND_LOG ml WHERE ml.execution_id = el.execution_id AND ml.send_status = 'SENT') AS sent_count FROM dbo.JOB_EXECUTION_LOG el JOIN dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj ON el.job_id = sj.job_id JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id ORDER BY el.created_at DESC

SELECT TOP (#{limit}) el.execution_id, el.job_id, sj.job_label, r.report_name, el.jasper_fire_time, el.execution_status, el.triggered_by, el.error_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.MAIL_SEND_LOG ml WHERE ml.execution_id = el.execution_id AND ml.send_status = 'SENT') AS sent_count FROM dbo.JOB_EXECUTION_LOG el JOIN dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj ON el.job_id = sj.job_id JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id WHERE 1=1 AND el.execution_status = #{status} AND el.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY el.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.MAIL_SEND_LOG (execution_id, recipient_email, recipient_type, user_type, send_status, sent_at, error_message) VALUES (#{executionId}, #{email}, #{recipientType}, #{userType}, #{status}, SYSDATETIME(), #{error})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.MAIL_SEND_LOG WHERE send_status = 'SENT' AND YEAR(sent_at) = YEAR(SYSDATETIME()) AND MONTH(sent_at) = MONTH(SYSDATETIME())

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), d.day_date, 10) AS day_label, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN el.execution_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_count, ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN el.execution_status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_count FROM ( SELECT CAST(DATEADD(DAY, -n, CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)) AS DATE) AS day_date FROM (VALUES(0),(1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6)) AS t(n) ) d LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_EXECUTION_LOG el ON CAST(el.created_at AS DATE) = d.day_date GROUP BY d.day_date ORDER BY d.day_date

SELECT TOP (#{limit}) sj.job_id, sj.job_label, sj.output_formats, sj.status, jt.cron_expression AS next_fire_time FROM dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_TRIGGER jt ON sj.job_id = jt.job_id WHERE sj.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sj.job_id
